summary:
# 今日社区动态（MiniMax-M2.7 | 2026-05-19 ~ 2026-05-20）

- 🧠 [Memory](#subsystem-Memory)：hugetlb预留泄漏修复提升内存分配可靠性，dmem双重计费机制增强嵌套内存追踪，vmalloc收缩优化减少内存碎片，userfaultfd快照增强页面故障原子性
- 🌐 [Networking](#subsystem-Networking)：修复多处安全漏洞（netfilter越界、ip6_vti资源泄漏、蓝牙帧长度检查），vsock/wwan修复use-after-free和内存泄漏问题，整体提升协议安全性
- 🛡 [Security](#subsystem-Security)：Landlock清理编译器警告，LSM更新安全策略管理接口，整体代码质量提升
- 📈 [Observability](#subsystem-Observability)：多为小修正和清理，维护性更新
- 🗂 [Filesystem & Storage](#subsystem-Filesystem%20%26%20Storage)：大量小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- 🏗 [Architecture](#subsystem-Architecture)：RISC-V memcmp优化提升字符串比较性能，ARM64移除内核数据线性别名增强内存安全，大量新设备树支持（Qualcomm、Renesas、MediaTek等），PCI/Crypto多项改进
- 🔋 [Power Management](#subsystem-Power%20Management)：为Airoha AN7583添加完整热管理驱动，Qualcomm Shikra cpufreq支持提升能效，修复intel_pstate状态同步问题
- ⏱ [Clocks & Timers](#subsystem-Clocks%20%26%20Timers)：STM32MP21/MP25时钟驱动补全，Airoha USB时钟PHY支持，Renesas RZ/G2L时钟宏统一，修复定时器迁移问题
- ⚙ [Core Kernel](#subsystem-Core%20Kernel)：多为小修正和清理，维护性更新
- 🧩 [Virtualization](#subsystem-Virtualization)：s390 vfio-pci zPCI函数测量增强监控，NVIDIA GB10 GPU vfio支持，ARM CCA guest驱动修复，KVM SEV合并冲突解决
- 🧰 [Drivers](#subsystem-Drivers)：mmc/ACPI优化硬件发现和功耗，drm/virtio修复死锁，大量新驱动支持（AVIA HX710B、infineon XDP730等），多处资源泄漏修复提升稳定性

## Memory
- `feature` hugetlb: 在 hugepage 映射失败时恢复预留区域，解决预留泄漏问题并提升内存分配可靠性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/63)
- `feature` cgroup/dmem: 实现内存 cgroup 的双重计费机制，允许更精确的嵌套层级内存追踪与控制 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1872)
- `feature` vmalloc: vrealloc() 收缩时释放未使用页面，优化内存碎片化并减少不必要的内存占用 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1293)
- `feature` userfaultfd: 在 UFFDIO_COPY 操作期间跨 CPU 快照 VMA 状态，增强用户态页面故障处理的原子性和一致性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/269)
- `bugfix` page_isolation: 修复 hugepage 扫描步长下溢问题，防止越界访问并提升内存隔离操作的稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1308)
- `bugfix` slub: 修复 sysfs_slab_add 中的引用计数泄漏，避免内存泄漏和潜在的系统资源耗尽 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/291)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1583)

## Networking
- `bugfix` netfilter: nf_conntrack_irc 修复 parse_dcc() 函数中的 off-by-one 越界问题，防止恶意 IRC DCC 消息导致缓冲区溢出 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2326)
- `bugfix` net/ipv6: ip6_vti 修复 vti6_changelink 和 vti6_siocdevprivate 中的资源管理问题，确保隧道配置变更时正确释放资源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1364)
- `bugfix` bluetooth: bnep 在解析帧内容前先检查帧长度是否满足最小要求，避免对过短帧进行越界访问，提升协议安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1228)
- `bugfix` vsock: vmci 修复对等端重置连接时可能出现的 use-after-free 问题，通过改进连接关闭时的同步机制防止访问已释放内存 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/979)
- `bugfix` net/wwan: iosm 修复 ipc_imem 子系统中潜在的 use-after-free 漏洞，改进内存生命周期管理避免在异步操作中访问已释放对象 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/420)
- `bugfix` net/wwan: iosm 修复 ipc_imem 子系统中的内存泄漏问题，确保错误路径下正确释放已分配资源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/378)
- `bugfix` wifi: iwlwifi mld 修复 tlc.c 中的缩进错误，改善代码可读性和维护性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/312)

## Security
- `feature` Landlock 安全模块修复 memcpy 静态检查警告，清理代码以消除编译器警告，提升代码质量 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2262)
- `feature` Linux 安全模块（LSM）子系统拉取请求，更新安全策略管理接口，增强安全机制 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2240)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/706)

## Observability
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2158) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2068) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1288) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1170) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1151) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/229) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1051) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1989) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/965) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/556) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/66) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/203) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/200) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/677) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/641) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/564)

## Filesystem & Storage
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2263) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2250) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1626) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1140) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/942) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2193) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1697) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/803) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1250) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/220) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/112) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/98) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/544) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/303) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/930) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1980)

## Architecture
- `perf` `feature` RISC-V 添加优化的 memcmp() 实现并扩展 KUnit 测试用例，提升字符串比较性能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1552)
- `perf` `feature` crypto/dmaengine: qce 引入 BAM 锁定机制优化 DMA 操作，提高加密性能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1465)
- `perf` `feature` PCI: cadence 添加 LTSSM 调试文件系统，便于诊断 PCIe 链路训练状态问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1356)
- `perf` `feature` ARM64 mm 在 /proc/meminfo 中显示直接映射使用情况，便于内存分析 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1953)
- `perf` `feature` imx94 修复 DDR PMU 中断号问题，提升性能监控准确性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1096)
- `perf` `feature` Qualcomm SPEL powercap 驱动添加能效监控功能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1109)
- `perf` `feature` PCI 引入 pci_suspend_retains_context() API 保留上下文优化 suspend 流程 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/609)
- `perf` `feature` x86/amd/uncore 为 Hygon 处理器添加通用 uncore 性能监控支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/213)
- `feature` ARM64 entry 层不再在 debug_exception 中禁用抢占，简化异常处理流程 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2372)
- `feature` x86/mm 当 PCID 被禁用时关闭广播 TLB 刷新机制，确保内存一致性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2178)
- `feature` ARM64 取消映射内核数据/bss 的线性别名，增强内存安全性和边界检查 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1760)
- `feature` lib 和 lib/cmdline 增强补丁，改进字符串转换和命令行解析功能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2030)
- `feature` RISC-V kexec_file 将段放置约束到直接映射区域，优化 kexec 功能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/13)
- `feature` RISC-V 无条件选择 ARCH_KEEP_MEMBLOCK 保留 memblock 内存 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/11)
- `feature` RISC-V CFI 将生成的 vdso 文件添加到 make clean，保持构建清洁 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1922)
- `feature` RISC-V 将影子栈大小限制从 4GB 减少到 2GB，节省内存资源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/471)
- `feature` RISC-V 跟踪有效硬件 PTE A/D 更新，提升页表管理准确性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/207)
- `feature` KVM s390 修复 vSIE 和 UCONTROL 相关问题，改善虚拟化稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1694)
- `feature` LoongArch KVM 中断注入小增强，优化虚拟 CPU 中断处理 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/844)
- `feature` ARM64 dts 添加 Eliza CQS EVK 设备树支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1936)
- `feature` ARM64 dts glymur-crd 移动公共板级节点到共享 dtsi [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1637)
- `feature` ARM64 dts glymur 添加 coresight 调试组件节点 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1440)
- `feature` ARM64 dts 添加 QCS6490 Vicharak Axon Mini 开发板支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1396)
- `feature` ARM64 dts 添加 Qualcomm Shikra 系列开发板设备树 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1196)
- `feature` ARM64 dts imx91-11x11-evk/imx91-9x9-qsb 清理和优化 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1169)
- `feature` ARM64 dts imx95 修正 PCIe 出站地址空间配置 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/451)
- `feature` ARM64 dts imx95 修正 PCIe 出站地址空间配置（v5版本） [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/145)
- `feature` ARM64 dts imx943-evk 修复 PCIe EP vpcie 电源配置 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/299)
- `feature` ARM64 dts imx943-evk-sdwifi 添加 SD-WiFi 设备树覆盖 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/282)
- `feature` ARM64 dts lemans-evk 通过 I2C GPIO 启用 CAN 接收 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/413)
- `feature` ARM64 dts 添加 Nord SA8797P 初始设备树支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/408)
- `feature` ARM64 dts qcom ipq5018 修正 CMN PLL 参考时钟源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/307)
- `feature` ARM64 dts sm8750 添加 CCI 和 CAMSS 相机接口支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/468)
- `feature` ARM64 dts 为 Samsung Galaxy S4 添加设备树支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/476)
- `feature` ARM64 dts qcom 为 J721S2 EVM 启用音频支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1631)
- `feature` ARM64 dts renesas RZ/G3L SMARC EVK 启用 RSPI 接口 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1233)
- `feature` ARM64 dts renesas RZ/G3L SMARC EVK 启用 RSCI 接口 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/916)
- `feature` ARM64 dts mediatek mt8516 移除 cpu3 armpll 时钟名称 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/689)
- `feature` ARM64 dts qcom IPQ9650 启用 icc-clk 互联时钟支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/724)
- `feature` arm64 unwind 添加 sframe 展开器用于内核堆栈追踪 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/427)
- `feature` x86/cpu 保持 PROCESSOR_SELECT 菜单项聚合在一起，改善配置体验 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2035)
- `feature` s390 启用 Rust 支持并添加必需的架构粘合代码 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1733)
- `feature` firmware qcom scm 添加 minidump SRAM 目标支持用于固件调试 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2011)
- `feature` RISC-V boot dts 为 SpacemiT K3 添加 QSPI 支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/355)
- `bugfix` firmware edd 修复 edd_device_register 中的引用计数泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/517)
- `bugfix` usb typec ucsi 添加电源角色切换的额外检查，防止异常切换 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1273)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/364)

## Power Management
- `feature` 为 Airoha AN7583 芯片添加完整的热管理驱动支持，包括硬件绑定配置和温控逻辑，满足该芯片在能效和过热保护方面的基础需求 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/49)
- `feature` 添加 MPS MP8899 PMIC 的 regulator 驱动，实现电压调节功能，为使用该电源管理芯片的设备提供稳定的电源管理能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2111)
- `feature` 为 Qualcomm Shikra SoC 添加 cpufreq scaling 驱动支持，使该新芯片能够实现 CPU 频率动态调节，提升电源管理灵活性和能效表现 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2028)
- `feature` 修复 intel_pstate 驱动在设置策略时 policy->cur 未能同步的问题，确保 CPU 当前频率状态与策略状态一致，避免频率管理出现状态不一致的情况 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1182)

## Clocks & Timers
- `feature` 添加STM32MP21/MP25时钟驱动缺失的bitfield.h头文件，解决内核头文件使用不完整导致的编译问题，提升代码健壮性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2374)
- `feature` 为Airoha AN7581芯片添加USB时钟和PHY支持，包括en7523-scu时钟驱动及an7581 USB/PCIe PHY驱动，完善该芯片的硬件支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/37)
- `feature` 统一Renesas RZ/G2L系列时钟驱动的SAM PLL配置宏，消除R9A07G043/R9A07G044/R9A08G045等芯片驱动中的重复代码，提升可维护性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1574)
- `bugfix` 修复定时器迁移模块在per-capacity层次结构上的问题，改善多核系统定时器负载均衡的正确性和稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/20/43)

## Core Kernel
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2040) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2322) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2197) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2164) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1889) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1874) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1505) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1414) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1337) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1152) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/892) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/852) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/758) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1934) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1432) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1381) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1142)

## Virtualization
- `feature` 添加 s390 架构上 vfio-pci 的 zPCI 函数测量功能，增强 IBM LinuxONE 和 s390x 平台上 PCI 设备的监控和诊断能力，对安全敏感的云环境有重要意义 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2383)
- `feature` 在 arm-cca-guest 驱动中使用 smp_processor_id 的 raw 变体，修复 ARM 机密计算架构 guest 环境中可能存在的上下文问题，提升驱动在 CCA 模式下的稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/935)
- `feature` 为 NVIDIA GB10 GPU (设备 ID 0x2e12) 添加 vfio 驱动支持，使 Grace-Hopper 超级芯片的 GPU 能够在虚拟化场景中被正确识别和分配 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2209)
- `bugfix` 修复 KVM SEV 模块中的合并冲突问题，解决了代码合并过程中可能引入的不一致，确保 AMD 安全加密虚拟化功能在主线内核中正常运作 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/2261)

## Drivers
- `perf` `feature` mmc: renesas_sdhi: 为RZ/G2H、RZ/G2N、RZ/G2E等型号添加OF设备树条目，改善硬件发现效率与兼容性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/1543)
- `perf` `feature` ACPI: processor: 在acpi_processor_cst_detection中增加cpuidle驱动检查，确保空闲状态正确初始化并优化功耗 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/819)
- `perf` `feature` drm/virtio: 将plane更新的resv锁改为不可中断模式，避免信号中断导致的死锁问题并提升渲染稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/668)
- `perf` `feature` iio: adc: 添加AVIA HX710B ADC驱动支持，为高精度称重传感器提供Linux驱动支持 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/5/19/51)
